title: Disney Store Official Dory Small Soft Toy for Kids, Finding Nemo, 32cm/12”, Blue Tang Fish Plush Character Figure with Embroidered Details, Suitable for Ages 0+
features: Iconic Sea Companion: This Dory soft toy, inspired by Disney Pixar's Finding Nemo, features embroidered details that bring the beloved, forgetful fish to life.
Soft and Cuddly: Made from polyester with a soft-feel finish, this Dory plush toy is ready to swim into your little one's heart and become their favourite cuddly companion.
Unforgettable Expression: Characterful expression, capturing Dory's delightful and unique personality. She might forget, but you and your kids certainly won't!
Perfect Pixar Gift: Whether it's for a birthday, holiday or just because, this Dory plush toy makes the ideal gift for all Finding Nemo fans. It's a great addition to any Disney toy collection.
An Official Disney Product: As always, you're purchasing an authentic Disney product from the Disney Store on Amazon. Let Dory swim her way into your home with confidence!
description: Product Description Explore our range of Disney plush including Stitch, Mickey Mouse, Olaf and more: Dive into a world of enchantment with our Disney Store soft toys! From classic characters to beloved newcomers, our plush companions bring magic to every hug. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. Disney Store Soft Toys Merchant video Our Disney Store soft toys offer a timeless embrace for fans of all ages, capturing the essence of beloved characters with every squeeze. Explore a world of soft toys and find huggable new friends in all shapes and sizes. Embark on a journey of imagination with our authentic Disney Store soft toys, crafted to bring the charm and wonder of Disney magic into your home. Our Disney Store soft toys are the perfect companions, ready to make every moment memorable with their irresistible charm and cuddly embrace.
